name: audit/queue.py
what_it_solves: Python module 'audit/queue.py' referenced by the architecture / hardening audit corpus.
how_it_solves: Extracted by regex `[/\w._-]+\.py(?::\d+)?` — every mention captured with source_file + line + context window.
why_it_exists: Enumerates the concrete code surface the architecture reports point at, so downstream consumers can walk from a claim to an actual file:line without re-reading the whole report.
